scraped_messages.message: Database leak: 100,000 employee records from TechCorp including passwords and SSNs. Asking for 50 BTC ransom.
RaaS operation: 15 victims compromised this month. Fastest payment processing on the dark web. Bitcoin and Monero accepted.
Zero-day vulnerability in Apache Log4j published with working PoC code. Full weaponization available.
50,000 PaymentGateway credentials leaked. Login credentials tested and verified working on 95% of accounts.
Ransomware-as-a-Service platform accepting new customers. Full SDK provided. C2 infrastructure stable and tested.
Stolen credit card database: 2M Visa/Mastercard with CVV. $5 per card, bulk discounts available.
DDoS-for-hire: 1Gbps+ capacity. Tested against major financial institutions. $50/hour starting price.
SQL injection kit targeting WordPress sites. Automated scanning and exploitation included. Mass campaign active.
Healthcare provider data: 500K patient records with SSN, insurance, medical history. $50K asking price.
Botnet control panels: 500K+ compromised Windows machines. Full access available. Starting at $1000/month.
APT group recruiting: Looking for skilled penetration testers. Targeting energy sector infrastructure. High pay rates.
Metasploit module for Windows 11 exploitation. 0-day UAC bypass included. Detection evasion techniques provided.
Stealer malware targeting cryptocurrency wallets and banking credentials. 30% infection rate documented.
Financial institution source code leaked: Swift banking system integration. Critical vulnerabilities documented.
Fake identity documents: Passports, driver licenses, college degrees. All holograms included. Verified authentic.
Phishing kits for major banks: 95% success rate reported. Pre-configured landing pages and email templates.
Cisco IOS vulnerability (CVE-2024-5678): Remote code execution. 100K+ affected devices worldwide.
Information stealer: Office 365, AWS, Azure credentials harvesting. 10K+ victims tracked. Daily fresh samples.
Cloud infrastructure secrets leak: API keys, database credentials from 50+ companies. Verified access confirmed.
Compromised GitHub accounts: Full access with admin rights. Code injection possibilities. 100+ accounts available.
Supply chain attack coordination: Major retailer inventory system compromised. Ready for mass product substitution.
Browser 0-days: Chrome, Firefox, Safari all vulnerable. Exploit chain for full system compromise demonstrated.
Wiper malware targeting critical infrastructure: Tested on energy grids. Irreversible data destruction.
Government database breach: Citizenship records, biometric data, travel history. 1M records affected.
OPSEC guide: How to evade attribution and law enforcement tracking. Tested and verified by active threat actors.
Ransomware gang negotiations: Real-time leak of negotiation chats and payment amounts from latest victims.
VMware vCenter RCE: 50K+ vulnerable instances exposed. Exploit tools publicly released with mass scanning.
Cryptojacker: Silently mines cryptocurrency on 100K+ PC. Undetectable by antivirus. Automatic update mechanism.
AI model source code stolen: GPT-like model training data and weights released. Ready for commercial exploitation.
Insider threat marketplace: Corporate employees selling trade secrets, business plans, upcoming product launches.
Mobile banking malware: Android and iOS trojans targeting financial apps. Session hijacking capabilities included.
Kubernetes cluster exploitation guide: Mass container escape techniques. Production systems targeted.
Spyware for iPhones: Zero-click exploitation of iMessage. Complete device surveillance without detection.
Military contractor network breach: Classified project details, weapons system specifications leaked.
Deepfake generation service: Custom video synthesis of politicians and celebrities. Weaponization for misinformation.
Election interference campaign: Voter database manipulation techniques. Proven effectiveness in multiple countries.
SQL Server exploitation framework: T-SQL post-exploitation tools for full environment compromise.
File-less malware: Registry-based persistence. Traditional antivirus completely bypassed. Memory-only operation.
Medical device vulnerabilities: Insulin pumps and pacemakers. Remote command injection demonstrated successfully.
BGP hijacking services: Redirect internet traffic for victim. DNS spoofing capabilities included.
Backup system exploitation: Veeam and Commvault bypass techniques. Ransomware recovery impossible.
Certificate authority compromise: SSL certificate generation for any domain. Full MITM capabilities.
Quantum computing cryptanalysis service: RSA 2048-bit keys breakable. Ready for deployment.
Satellite communication intercept data: Military and commercial satellite signals decoded and analyzed.
Social engineering guide: CEO fraud protocols tested against Fortune 500 companies. $50M+ confirmed stolen.
Smart contract vulnerabilities: Flash loan attacks for protocol manipulation. $100M+ possible theft.
5G network exploitation: Node B compromise techniques. National infrastructure vulnerability.
Firmware rootkit: BIOS/UEFI level persistence. Survives OS reinstallation and disk formatting.
Nuclear facility network topology: SCADA system details from multiple countries' power plants revealed.
Complete cyber weapons delivery service: End-to-end offensive capabilities provided. CTOs and nation-states welcome.
